description_long: This is a two-story school building with a red gabled tile roof and a rectangular footprint. The facade features a series of evenly spaced doors and windows, likely corresponding to classrooms or administrative offices, with a covered walkway running along the front. A prominent external staircase on one side provides access to the upper floor, connecting to a landing that runs the length of the building. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the structure sits on a raised concrete platform. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing practicality and accessibility. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and masonry, with wooden or metal doors and window frames.
description: A two-story, rectangular school building with a red tile roof, light-colored walls, and an external staircase. The facade features multiple doors and windows, with a covered walkway on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main facade with two rows of doors and windows, a covered walkway, and an external staircase on the left.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the length of the building, the red gabled roof, and the external staircase structure.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain wall with minimal openings and the continuation of the roof and platform.
description_view_3: The top-down view emphasizes the red tile roof and the rectangular shape of the building, with the staircase structure visible at one end.
